div.title: Auto-add every scanned product to print list
div.label: Auto-add

t.div:
No saved filters yet.
Build a filter and save it below.

div.small:
Your current filter matches 0 products.
Try adjusting or clearing the filter.
There are no products in the database.

button.title: Convert to Title Case (e.g. 'andyka noz' → 'Andyka Noz')
Create dedicated pricelist for this product

div.p: Use your barcode scanner or type a barcode/code/name in the search field above.

button.title: Convert to Title Case (e.g. 'andyka noz' → 'Andyka Noz')

div.small: Scan products and add them to the list

div.p: Enter the new cost value for .
Enter the new stock quantity for .

div.label: Quantity (Inventory Adjustment)
div.small: This will create and apply an inventory adjustment in the main warehouse automatically.

div.p: This product likely already has transactions (purchases, sales, or stock moves). To recover, duplicate this product with Track Inventory already enabled and archive the original.

ul.li: The barcode and internal reference will be moved to the duplicate (so scanning still finds the right product)
Cost, sales price, image, category, and per-product pricelist rules are copied
The original product is archived automatically
